Dear Students,

The Science Club invites you to a hands-on workshop on simple circuits on 16 June 2026. Limited seats available.

Regards

Dear Parents,

This is to inform you that the Mid-Term Examination for Classes VI to VIII will commence on Monday, 8 June 2026. The detailed datesheet will be shared shortly.

Regards,
Class Teacher

Dear Students,

PFA the worksheet for revision. Kindly complete it in your notebook and submit by Thursday.

Regards

Dear Students,

The Inter-House Debate Competition will be held on 18 June 2026. Interested students may register with their respective house captains by 14 June.

Regards
